title: podman-systemd.unit.5.md: example `--add-host foobar` in podman-systemd.unit.5.md has incorrect syntax
body:
### Issue Description

```
--add-host foobar
```
in
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/fdb8b1c6d3a6820acfd5af812075ff0a0721748c/docs/source/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.md?plain=1#L306

does not follow the syntax of the __podman run__ option __--add-host__

__--add-host__=host:ip

See man page of `podman run` https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-run.1.html#add-host-host-ip
